entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: The primary crop studied for fertiliser use efficiency and profitability in East Africa

entities.name: FERTILISER
entities.description: Agricultural inputs used to provide nutrients to crops to increase yield

entities.name: NITROGEN
entities.description: A key nutrient provided by fertilisers to increase maize yield

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS
entities.description: A key nutrient provided by fertilisers to increase maize yield

entities.name: PRODUCTION RISKS
entities.description: The uncertainty and potential for loss in crop production associated with fertiliser use

entities.name: PROFITABILITY
entities.description: The economic gain or loss resulting from the use of fertilisers on smallholder farms

entities.name: EAST AFRICA
entities.description: The geographical region where the study was conducted

entities.name: KENYA
entities.description: A country in East Africa where on-farm trials were conducted

entities.name: RWANDA
entities.description: A country in East Africa where on-farm trials were conducted

entities.name: TANZANIA
entities.description: A country in East Africa where on-farm trials were conducted

entities.name: UGANDA
entities.description: A country in East Africa where on-farm trials were conducted

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per unit area, with a target of 3 t ha-1

entities.name: AGRONOMIC USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency with which maize crops utilize applied nutrients like N and P

entities.name: VALUE COST RATIO
entities.description: A measure of the economic return on fertiliser investment

entities.name: NET PRESENT VALUE
entities.description: A financial metric used to determine long-term profitability

entities.name: SOIL TYPE
entities.description: The classification of soil which affects nutrient use and production risk

entities.name: LIXISOLS
entities.description: A soil type associated with higher production risks and lower grain yield probability

entities.name: FERRALSOLS
entities.description: A soil type associated with higher production risks

entities.name: NITISOLS
entities.description: A soil type associated with lower production risks and higher grain yield probability

entities.name: LEPTOSOLS
entities.description: A soil type associated with lower production risks and higher grain yield probability

entities.name: VERTISOLS
entities.description: A soil type associated with lower production risks

entities.name: PLINTHOSOLS
entities.description: A soil type associated with higher production risks and lowest agronomic use efficiency

entities.name: CAMBISOLS
entities.description: A soil type associated with lower production risks and highest agronomic use efficiency

entities.name: SEASON
entities.description: The timing of the rains affecting production risks and nutrient use efficiency
